model.name: pollEnrich
model.title: Poll Enrich
model.description: Enriches messages with data polled from a secondary resource
model.label: eip,transformation

id.description: Sets the id of this node

note.description: Sets the note of this node

description.description: Sets the description of this node

disabled.label: advanced
disabled.description: Whether to disable this EIP from the route during build time. Once an EIP has been disabled then it cannot be enabled later at runtime.

variableReceive.description: To use a variable to store the received message body (only body, not headers). This makes it handy to use variables for user data and to easily control what data to use for sending and receiving.

aggregationStrategy.description: Sets the AggregationStrategy to be used to merge the reply from the external service, into a single outgoing message. By default Camel will use the reply from the external service as outgoing message.

aggregationStrategyMethodName.label: advanced
aggregationStrategyMethodName.description: This option can be used to explicitly declare the method name to use, when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.label: advanced
aggregationStrategyMethodAllowNull.description: If this option is false then the aggregate method is not used if there was no data to enrich. If this option is true then null values is used as the oldExchange (when no data to enrich), when using POJOs as the AggregationStrategy.

aggregateOnException.label: advanced
aggregateOnException.description: If this option is false then the aggregate method is not used if there was an exception thrown while trying to retrieve the data to enrich from the resource. Setting this option to true allows end users to control what to do if there was an exception in the aggregate method.

timeout.description: Timeout in millis when polling from the external service. A negative value waits until a message is available (could block indefinitely). Zero attempts to receive immediately without waiting. A positive value waits up to the given timeout.

cacheSize.label: advanced
cacheSize.description: Sets the maximum size used by the ConsumerCache which is used to cache and reuse consumers when uris are reused. Use 0 for default cache size, or -1 to turn cache off.

ignoreInvalidEndpoint.label: advanced
ignoreInvalidEndpoint.description: Whether to ignore an invalid endpoint URI when trying to create a consumer with that endpoint.

allowOptimisedComponents.label: advanced
allowOptimisedComponents.description: Whether to allow components to optimise if they are PollDynamicAware.

autoStartComponents.label: advanced
autoStartComponents.description: Whether to auto startup components when poll enricher is starting up.

CamelToEndpoint.label: producer
CamelToEndpoint.description: Endpoint URI where this Exchange is being sent to
